title: Dog Health Training Log
author: Deokgu Studio
description:
One book, your dog's whole life. From puppyhood vaccinations to senior-dog vet visits, this 142-page health and training log is the complete record every responsible owner wishes they'd started on day one.

Who it's for:
- New puppy parents (start here on day one)
- Owners of multiple dogs, foster dogs, or breeding programs
- Anyone training a service dog, working dog, or competition dog
- Pet sitters and dog walkers tracking other people's pups

What's inside:
- Profile, microchip, breed info, and emergency contact pages
- Vaccination, deworming, and flea/tick treatment schedules
- Vet visit log: weight, diagnosis, prescriptions, follow-ups
- Grooming, dental, and nail care tracking
- Training progress: commands learned, dates mastered, problem behaviors
- Daily walk, exercise, and food/water log spreads
- Photo memory pages for each milestone

Vets can finally look back instead of guessing. New trainers can pick up exactly where the last one left off. And on the heartbreaking day you lose your best friend, you'll have a record of every adventure you shared.

Get the journal your dog deserves.
